tier0_auto_dependency_patch.description: Direct or tightly bounded dependency remediation with high confidence and existing validation coverage.

tier1_auto_targeted_runtime.description: Runtime-impacting remediation that still has a bounded surface and a credible targeted validation path.
manual_checks: Review impacted feature area in PR summary.

tier2_manual_review.description: Broader runtime or transitive dependency change that may require human review before execution.

tier3_manual_hold.description: High-risk or low-confidence work item where the system should stop after scoping and request human direction.
